name: Menu
description: Floating action menu with trigger, panel, items, and optional nested submenus/groups.
import: import { Menu, MenuItem, MenuTrigger, MenuPanel, MenuGroup } from "@salt-ds/core";

defaultOpen.description: Initial open state for uncontrolled usage.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when open state changes.

placement.default: 'bottom-start' for root menu, 'right-start' for nested menus
placement.description: Position of menu panel relative to trigger or parent item.

getVirtualElement.description: Provides virtual anchor element (for example context menu positioning), replacing `MenuTrigger` reference.

MenuItem.disabled.description: Disables menu item interaction and submenu trigger behavior.

MenuGroup.label.description: Accessible label for related menu item groups.

slots.MenuTrigger.children: Single trigger element that accepts a ref (for example `Button` or submenu `MenuItem`).
slots.MenuPanel.children: Menu content: `MenuItem`, nested `Menu`, and optional `MenuGroup` organization.
slots.MenuItem.children: Menu item label/content; icons are typically placed before label text.

keyboard: Tab closes menu and moves focus to next focusable element
Shift+Tab closes menu and moves focus to previous focusable element
Enter/Space opens from trigger, opens submenu on submenu item, or activates focused item
ArrowDown/ArrowUp move to next/previous menu item
ArrowRight opens submenu from submenu trigger item
ArrowLeft closes submenu and returns focus to parent item
Escape closes menu and returns focus to opening element
aria: Menu items expose `role=menuitem` and disabled items expose `aria-disabled=true`
Submenu trigger items expose expanded state
Menu groups expose `role=group` and use group label semantics when `label` is provided

inside: Secondary action collections tied to a trigger control
